endpoints.size_groups: GET /api/v2/size_groups?catalog_id=<catalog_id> (returns full master list of all 44 groups)

statuses.title: New with tags
statuses.description: A brand-new, unused item with tags attached or in the original packaging.
statuses.explanation: A brand-new, unused item with tags attached or in the original packaging.
statuses.explanation_title: Brand new and still has the tags?

statuses.title: New without tags
statuses.description: A brand-new, unused item without tags or original packaging.
statuses.explanation: A brand-new, unused item without tags or original packaging.

statuses.title: Very good
statuses.description: A lightly used item that may have slight imperfections, but still looks great.
statuses.explanation: A lightly used item that may have slight imperfections, but still looks great. Include photos and descriptions of any flaws in your listing.
statuses.explanation_title: L’article a déjà été porté mais n’a pas de défaut apparent ?

statuses.title: Good
statuses.description: A used item that may show imperfections and signs of wear.
statuses.explanation: A used item that may show imperfections and signs of wear. Include photos and descriptions of flaws in your listing.
statuses.explanation_title: Worn this a bit and no visible flaws?

statuses.title: Satisfactory
statuses.description: A frequently used item with imperfections and signs of wear.
statuses.explanation: A frequently used item with imperfections and signs of wear. Include photos and descriptions of flaws in your listing.

statuses.title: Not fully functional
statuses.description: An item that's not fully functional, with parts that are broken and don't work.
statuses.explanation: An item that's not fully functional, with parts that are broken and don't work. Include clear photos and descriptions of flaws in your listing.
